title: 18 India-Flagged Ships Carrying Crude Oil, LPG Stranded In Hormuz Amid War
description: So far, eight Indian-flagged vessels have sailed out of the strait safely. These include two LPG carriers -- BW TYR and BW ELM -- carrying a combined LPG cargo of about 94,000 tonnes, which safely transited the war-hit zone in the last couple of days
